ddls:
CREATE TABLE "device_services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service (e.g., 0x0 Raw Data, 0x2003 Battery Service) */,
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attribute within the service */,
  "attribute_name" TEXT /* Name of the attribute (e.g., 0x0 Raw Data, 0x1001 Get voltage of the battery) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the attribute (e.g., uint8 *buffer, uint16) */,
  "read_write" TEXT /* Read/Write permissions for the attribute (e.g., R, RW) */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data stored in the attribute */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device associated with the service */,
  "service_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the service */,
  "attribute_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the attribute */,
  "attribute_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the attribute */,
  "attribute_min_value" REAL /* Minimum value for the attribute */,
  "attribute_max_value" REAL /* Maximum value for the attribute */,
  "attribute_default_value" TEXT /* Default value for the attribute */,
  "attribute_last_modified" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification to the attribute */,
  "service_version" TEXT /* Version of the service */,
  "service_status" TEXT /* Status of the service (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id", "attribute_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "device_serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the device */,
  "device_firmware_version" TEXT /* Current firmware version of the device */,
  "device_mac_address" TEXT /* MAC address of the device */,
  "device_last_connected" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last connection to the device */,
  "device_status" TEXT /* Status of the device (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_firmware_versions" (
  "firmware_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each firmware version */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Version of the firmware */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date of the firmware release */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the firmware version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("firmware_id")
)
